## Tool Submission

**Tool name:** <!-- e.g., ripgrep -->
**Repository URL:** <!-- e.g., https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep -->
**What classic tool does it replace?** <!-- e.g., grep -->
**Language:** <!-- e.g., Rust, Go, Python -->

## Why is it awesome?

<!-- 
Explain what makes this tool worth including. Focus on concrete improvements:
- What problem does it solve better than the classic tool?
- Speed benchmarks, better defaults, safety features, UX improvements?
- Do NOT just say "it's written in Rust" or "it's modern" -- that's not enough.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tool has **100+ GitHub stars**
- [ ] Tool has been **committed to in the last 12 months**
- [ ] I have **tested this tool locally** or used it meaningfully
- [ ] Entry follows the **required format**: `[name](url) - Description. Replaces \`classic\`. \`Language\``
- [ ] Entry is in **alphabetical order** within its section
- [ ] This PR contains **only one tool**
- [ ] I have disclosed if I am the **author or maintainer** of this tool
